no_changes_rationale:
status: already_satisfied
rationale: All three acceptance criteria for ddx-1978065c are already satisfied in the current history, so there is no safe source edit to make in this attempt.

Evidence:
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/+page.svelte` imports the shared chip primitive from `$lib/components/FilterChip.svelte`, uses `VIRTUALIZE_THRESHOLD = 1000`, applies `content-visibility: auto` row windowing, and subscribes to `subscribeWorkerProgress` for live phase updates.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/+page.svelte` also imports the same `FilterChip`, confirming the primitive was extracted and shared.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts` exists in the current history via `45dd10df feat(runs): reuse virtualization and live phase updates [ddx-1978065c]`, covering the Runs UI behavior.

verification_command: bash -lc 'set -e; F=cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\\[nodeId\\]/projects/\\[projectId\\]/runs/+page.svelte; grep -q "import FilterChip from '\\$lib/components/FilterChip.svelte'" "$F"; grep -q "VIRTUALIZE_THRESHOLD = 1000" "$F"; grep -q "content-visibility: auto" "$F"; grep -q "subscribeWorkerProgress" "$F"; grep -q "RunRowDetail" "$F"; grep -q "FilterChip from '\\$lib/components/FilterChip.svelte'" cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\\[nodeId\\]/projects/\\[projectId\\]/artifacts/+page.svelte; test -f cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts'
